## Summary

What does this PR do? (1–3 sentences)

## Related

- Closes #
- RFC: docs/rfcs/RFC-NNN-...

## Changes

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Testing

How was this tested? What new tests were added?

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`just test`)
- [ ] Lints pass (`just lint`)
- [ ] Relevant docs updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] RFC linked (for significant design changes)
- [ ] AI assistance disclosed if applicable (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#ai-assisted-contributions))
